title: Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Mission & Vision
content:
Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Mission & Vision

Mission

With a team of professionals experienced in language instruction, we support the global promotion of the Turkish language and provide learners with the highest quality and most accurate education. Furthermore, we conduct long-term initiatives by leveraging advanced technologies suitable for language education.

Vision

To become a progressive institution in the field of language education, particularly for compatriots and foreigners who wish to learn Turkish both in Turkey and abroad, within a well-structured program. Additionally, to be recognized as a leading organization both nationally and internationally in promoting Turkey and Turkish culture to non-native speakers.

This content was updated on 12/08/2025.
